# RTS slice4 移動 log 匯出 t=: # RTS movement log　exported at t=
筆 欄位：時間 單位#id 世界座標 格 狀態 背負 目的 路徑長 卸貨邊緣距: rows.　Columns: time, unit #id, world position, tile, state, carrying, destination, path length, distance to drop-off edge, seconds stalled. Same id = same unit, so individuals can be traced.\n
左右各需至少一個兵: Each side needs at least one unit
目擊即知對手已承諾的文明: recognises a committed civilisation on sight
（它想打多大的波＝非作弊：仍全額付費、受糧食供養封頂）。: — how big a push it aims for. Not cheating: it still pays full price and is capped by what its food can support.
——仍全額付費、吃軍糧、不偷看視野（兵力位置/組成一律偵察）。: — it still pays full price, eats upkeep, and never peeks through the fog: army positions and composition have to be scouted.
公平級：與你同規則、同視野（兵力位置/組成一律偵察）、同價格。: Fair: same rules, same fog of war (positions and composition have to be scouted), same prices as you.
會派斥候偵察＋多線騷擾。: Sends scouts and harasses on several fronts.
